message:
Fix error handling and resource management issues

- CLI login: Add try-catch for JSON parsing of error responses to prevent
  crash when server returns non-JSON errors during device code flow
- CLI render: Cap maxContext to 10MB to prevent memory exhaustion DoS
- React components: Wrap DOM manipulation in try-finally to ensure cleanup
  of temporary anchor elements and URL object references

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
